puzzle.hint: Inner shield; a key Islamic concept meaning God-consciousness and self-restraint from sin
puzzle.arabicVerse: ذَٰلِكَ وَمَن يُعَظِّمْ شَعَـٰٓئِرَ ٱللَّهِ فَإِنَّهَا مِن تَقْوَى ٱلْقُلُوبِ
puzzle.verse: 22:32 - That [is so]. And whoever honors the symbols [i.e., rites] of Allāh - indeed, it is from the piety of hearts.
